Listen to 5 Live commentary alongside Final Score graphics, keeping you up to date on all the goals as they go in across Europe in the UEFA Champions League.
Enjoy the very best of the season in a natural escape that lets nature do the talking.
Gabby Logan presents highlights of the first-leg ties from the Champions League round of 16, with six Premier League clubs still in the tournament, as well as surprise package Bodo/Glimt.
